children.heading: Consultation with agency representatives
children.label: c Consultation with agency representatives
children.text: The Secretary shall consult, in accordance with the procedures set out in , with the exclusive representative (if any) of members of the Foreign Service in each agency specified in with respect to steps to be taken in implementing this chapter and reported under section 4001(c)(4) of this title. To that end, each such exclusive representative will have timely access to all relevant information at each stage. Each such report shall include the views of each such exclusive representative on any and all aspects of the report and the information contained in such report.section 4113(g) of this titlesection 4103(a) of this title1See References in Text note below.1
